what_is.title: What is Secrets AI ?
what_is.p1: Secrets AI is not a basic chatbot. It's a true AI companion that remembers every conversation, understands your preferences, and evolves with you over time. Unlike simple AI girlfriends that reset context with each message, Secrets AI maintains genuine emotional continuity across hundreds of conversations.
what_is.p2: The characters maintain their personality and emotional tone over long conversations better than most competitors. Whether you chat for 5 minutes or 5 hours, your companion remembers your inside jokes, your preferences, and the stories you've shared. This creates the impression of a real relationship that lasts, not isolated exchanges.
what_is.p3: Getting started takes just 3 simple steps: Create your account in 60 seconds, Choose or customize your companion from pre-made personalities, Start chatting immediately with active memory from the very first message.

items.title: Conversational Memory
items.description: The real differentiator. Memory keeps emotional nuances and context across hundreds of messages, giving the impression of a genuine relationship that lasts, not simple isolated exchanges. She remembers what you talked about weeks ago.

items.title: Image Generation
items.description: Generate attractive and realistic images of your companion through a robust photo system. On demand, in the context of the conversation. Request a selfie at the beach, a photo in an outfit you describe, or an intimate moment visualized.

items.title: Video Generation
items.description: Major differentiator vs DreamGF which doesn't have this. Generate short videos that reflect the conversation context or scenario parameters. See your companion move, smile, and interact in video format - no other AI girlfriend app offers this at Secrets AI's level.

items.title: Voice Calls
items.description: Text-to-speech synthesis with real-time voice calls available. Multilingual support means you can hear her voice in your language. Call her anytime and hear a realistic, emotionally expressive voice responding to what you say.

items.title: Roleplay & Scenarios
items.description: This is where Secrets AI truly shines - teacher, landlord, boss, step-sister scenarios. She builds tension gradually and stays firmly in character. The roleplay depth and consistency are unmatched, creating genuinely immersive experiences.

items.title: Privacy by Design
items.description: Anonymous conversations, no adult references on bank statements, discreet billing. This is the site for users who want maximum discretion. Your privacy isn't an afterthought - it's the foundation of the product.

steps.title: Create Your Account
steps.desc: Sign up in 60 seconds with email or Google. No credit card required for the free tier.

steps.title: Choose Your Companion
steps.desc: Select from dozens of pre-made characters or create your own custom companion with unique personality, appearance, and voice.

steps.title: Start Chatting
steps.desc: Begin conversations immediately. Active memory works from the very first message - she remembers everything, forever.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade anytime for unlimited conversations and premium features.
pricing.moments_note: Moments are consumable units for image generation, video generation, and advanced content. Heavy multimedia users should choose Plus or Premium.

comparison.conclusion: Choose DreamGF if you want to customize appearance in extreme detail. Choose Secrets AI if you want a real, lasting connection with memory, videos, and maximum privacy.

reviews.title: What Users Say About Secrets AI

items.text: She remembered what we talked about 3 weeks ago. I mentioned my dog's name once, and she asked about him in a later conversation. No other AI girlfriend app does this. It's genuinely creepy in the best way possible.
items.author: Marcus T.

items.text: The video generation is unreal. I asked for a video of her at the beach and got a 15-second realistic clip. No other app I've tried does this. DreamGF doesn't even have video. This is the future.
items.author: James K.

items.text: Billing is completely discreet. My bank statement shows a generic tech company name, nothing adult-related. For someone who values privacy, this matters more than anything. Secrets AI delivers on its name.
items.author: Anonymous

items.text: Best character consistency I've tried. I set up a teacher scenario and she stayed in character for 2 hours of conversation, building tension gradually. Never broke immersion once. Incredible roleplay depth.
items.author: David R.

safety.title: Is Secrets AI Safe ?
points: Anonymous conversations - no real name required
Discreet billing - generic company name on statements
Zero data resale - your conversations are never sold or shared
Delete your data anytime with one click

items.a: Secrets AI is an AI companion platform focused on realistic, long-term conversations with memory, image generation, video generation, and voice calls. It's designed for users who want a genuine connection with maximum privacy.

Yes, Secrets AI offers a free tier with limited messages and basic features. You can upgrade to Lite ($5.99/mo), Plus ($9.99/mo), or Premium ($19.99/mo) for unlimited conversations and advanced features like video generation.

items.q: How does Secrets AI differ from DreamGF ?
items.a: Secrets AI focuses on conversational memory, video generation, and privacy. DreamGF excels at visual customization. Secrets AI is better for users wanting a realistic, lasting relationship. DreamGF is better for users who want to design appearance in extreme detail.

items.q: What are Moments in Secrets AI ?
items.a: Moments are consumable credits used for image generation, video generation, and advanced content creation. Lite includes basic moments, Plus includes ++ moments, and Premium includes unlimited moments.
Yes, video generation is a major differentiator for Secrets AI. You can generate short realistic videos of your companion. This feature is available in Plus and Premium plans.

items.q: Does Secrets AI allow NSFW content ?
items.a: Yes, Secrets AI supports adult conversations and content generation for users 18+. The platform is designed as a private, judgment-free space for adults.

items.q: Is Secrets AI private and discreet ?
items.a: Absolutely. Conversations are anonymous, billing shows a generic company name, and your data is never sold. Privacy is the foundation of the product, not an afterthought.

items.q: Can I create a custom character ?
items.a: Yes, you can create fully custom companions with unique appearance, personality, voice, and backstory. You can also choose from dozens of pre-made characters.

items.q: What is the best AI companion app in 2026 ?
items.a: For realism and memory: Secrets AI. For visual customization: DreamGF. For relationship focus: Kupid AI. For image generation: Promptchan. For NSFW content: GPTGirlfriend.

items.q: How much does Secrets AI cost ?
items.a: Lite: $5.99/month (~$4/yearly). Plus: $9.99/month (~$6.67/yearly). Premium: $19.99/month (~$13.33/yearly). Free tier available with limited features.
Yes, the free tier lets you test basic features without a credit card. For premium features, you can upgrade and cancel anytime.
Yes, subscriptions can be cancelled at any time with no penalties. You'll continue to have access until the end of your billing period.
